excerpt: This post demonstrates an intelligent document processing pipeline that consists of both on-demand inference and batch inference options on Amazon Bedrock to enable the flexibility on the document processing time and cost.
summary_hint: This post demonstrates an intelligent document processing pipeline that consists of both on-demand inference and batch inference options on Amazon Bedrock to enable the flexibility on the document processing time and cost.
title: Extract Data with On-demand and Batch Pipelines Dynamically
